# MoneySorted
> Free UK bank statement analyser for individuals and accountants

## What it does
MoneySorted lets UK users upload bank statement PDFs and get instant spending analysis, transaction categorisation, and CSV/Excel export. No bank login required. Results in under 60 seconds.

## Who it's for
- UK individuals who want to understand where their money goes
- Accountants and bookkeepers processing client bank statements
- Small business owners tracking cash flow
- Anyone who wants to see their spending without connecting their bank

## Supported banks
Works with all major UK banks: Barclays, HSBC, Lloyds, NatWest, Halifax, Santander, Monzo, Starling Bank, TSB, and more.

## Key features
- AI-powered transaction categorisation
- Spending personality insights
- Subscription and recurring payment detection
- Money in vs money out breakdown
- CSV and Excel export
- Accountant mode for professional use
- Zero data retention — files deleted immediately after analysis
- No account or bank login required

## Pricing
- Free: upload and analyse, see spending breakdown
- Pro: advanced insights, full export, spending trends
- Business: bulk processing, client management, priority support

## Privacy
MoneySorted uses a zero-knowledge architecture. Bank statement files are processed and immediately deleted. No data is stored or sold.

## URL
https://www.getmoneysorted.co.uk

## Contact
getmoneysorted.co.uk
